name: Banana Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and sugar into a bowl.
2. Stir in oats.
3. Add remaining ingredients; stir only until dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Pour batter into a greased 8-1/2 inches x 4-1/2 inches x 2-1/2 inches loaf pan.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 55 to 60 minutes.
6. Cool on a wire rack about 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan and cool thoroughly.
8. Wrap the cooled bread and store until day before slicing.
